Holiday Thief Wand

Once in a while, a random enemy is bound with ice chains. That fighter's attacks become 90% slower. The cooldown time of their artifact ability is increased by 3 sec. All enemies around that fighter take 5200 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage per second for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
